features.name: large 2D unpacked memory array
features.description: Code should include a large 2D unpacked memory array with size exceeding 8192 elements and 64-bit width

features.name: conditional memory write in always block
features.description: Code should include a conditional memory write operation inside an always @(posedge) block

features.name: memory read via ternary with x-state output
features.description: Code should include a memory read accessed through a ternary operator that returns an uninitialized value when condition is false

features.name: register pipeline for memory address and enable signals
features.description: Code should include registers that pipeline memory address and control signals with always @(posedge) assignments
